name: Phillip Moffitt
bio: Phillip Moffitt is a vipassana meditation teacher and the founder of Life Balance Institute. He is a guiding teacher at Spirit Rock Meditation Center. Before his career in meditation teaching, he was editor-in-chief and CEO of Esquire Magazine. He is the author of 'Dancing with Life,' an exploration of the Buddha's Four Noble Truths, and 'Emotional Chaos to Clarity.' His teaching emphasizes bringing mindful awareness to daily living and emotional life.
